title: Against the Dark 3: Legend of the Archfiend
desc: A free hexcrawl adventure featuring four elemental tombs, a hex-mapped wilderness region, and a climactic Dark Castle. A relic hunt against lethal traps and an archfiend.

title: Ancient Talismans: The Whisperer Class
desc: A free class blending physical combat with psychic ability. The Whisperer channels power through ancient talismans, combining martial capability with mental influence.

title: Arcanist
desc: A class supplement presenting three flavors of arcane practitioner: the faithful mage-priest, the cultist who serves arcane spirits, and the occultist who channels primordial sorcery.

title: Brains and Brawn: The Library Knight Class
desc: A free class combining martial training with scholarly study. The Library Knight applies academic knowledge of monsters, dungeon hazards, and basic magic alongside solid combat capability.

title: Celtic Shadows
desc: A 162-page campaign sourcebook set in Mythic Ireland, covering levels 1–10. Includes cultural notes on Celtic history and mythology, 15+ adventures, a bestiary, two new classes, and optional mechanics for badly injured characters.

title: City of Hawkmoor
desc: A fantasy city designed for use with the Shadowdark RPG. City of Hawkmoor provides the framework for the Hawkmoor campaign setting, detailing the city at the heart of the Great Enchanted Vale.

title: Creature Classes
desc: Eight playable creature ancestry classes, usable as both player characters and monstrous opponents: Catkin, Equizards, Mind Mice, Petty Dragons, Shimmercats, Spirit Foxes, Sternulfs, and Wink Dogs. Includes a creature-specific background table.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 1: Diablerie!
desc: The first Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG, built around demon-haunted forests and crumbling castles. Adds three classes, 36 spells, six warlock patron concepts, 20 backgrounds, 14 monsters, and two ready-to-run locations: the dungeon Hideous Halls of Mugdulblub and the open hex crawl The Gloaming.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 2: Red Sands
desc: The second Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG, adding a scorching desert region to the game. Introduces three classes, 14 monsters, rules for mounted combat, pit fighting, poisons, and lasting wounds, plus two new locations: the 4th–6th level dungeon Fortress of the Burning Brothers and The Djurum desert hex crawl.

title: Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 3: Midnight Sun
desc: The third Cursed Scroll zine for Shadowdark RPG, setting adventures in a harsh Norse-inspired archipelago. Adds two classes, 12 monsters, rules for boats, oaths, and arctic conditions, plus two new locations: the 0-level gauntlet Hoard of the Sea Wolf King and the Isles of Andrik hex crawl.

title: Double Trouble: The Dancer Class
desc: A free class built around dual-wielding and evasion. The Dancer uses rapid movement and two-weapon techniques to outmaneuver opponents in close combat.

title: Expanded Dragons
desc: A dragon generation system covering six dragon types across 1st- to 20th-level power tiers. Each dragon is individually assembled from stats, talents, magic, and treasure rather than pulled from a single fixed template.

title: Expanded Races: Thanians
desc: Forty-one playable anthropomorphic animal ancestries collectively known as Thanians. Covers a wide range of beast-folk from canine to feline to reptilian and beyond, each with distinct traits for character creation.

title: Familiar Brews: The Practitioner Class
desc: A free Practitioner class. The Practitioner bonds with a powerful familiar and brews magical concoctions to aid allies and hinder foes.

title: Five Mini-Adventures
desc: Five standalone two-page adventures for 3rd–6th level characters, each set in a distinct location: an ancient horror-filled monolith, a sinking sea-palace prison, a desert cult temple, a pirate cavern, and a leprechaun's fey redoubt.

title: Forest Adventures
desc: A hex-based forest supplement for the Hawkmoor setting detailing Witchyflow Vale, adding the Oozeling ancestry, the Hermit class, 20 new spells, 15 new creatures, and 25 encounter-populated hexes with dual GM/player maps.

title: Hawkmoor Geographica
desc: A 48-page geographic gazetteer covering 70 regions of the Great Enchanted Vale in the Hawkmoor campaign setting, each with encounter tables. Provides GMs with detailed terrain to support sandbox play in Shadowdark.

title: Her Sun-Shattered Tears
desc: A free 1st-level dungeon delve originally created for the Shadowdark Independent Game Jam. Ten chambers of deadly traps and monsters, driven by an evocative sun-goddess theme.

title: Kaldera of the Sickle-Dancer
desc: A 3rd-level dungeon wound through the volcanic caldera lair of a warrior-dancer transformed into a marilith through dark sorcery. Twenty-one chambers of deadly encounters fill the winding passages below.

title: Kazad Mor: The Cursed Dwarfhome
desc: A 1st-level dungeon set in the abandoned halls of Kazad Mor, a cursed dwarven stronghold. Nearly forty rooms of hazards, monsters, and plunder await parties willing to plumb its depths.

title: Lost Caves of the Worm-Witch
desc: A 3rd-level dungeon set in the subterranean lair of an undead bard, featuring bizarre hybrid undead creatures and layered environments spanning a scorpion-god temple, kobold idol cult, and dark elf catacombs.

title: Off the Chain: The Sk8r Boi Class
desc: A free Sk8r Boi class. A sidewalk-surfer brought to the dungeon, using speed and acrobatic tricks to shred the darkness below.

title: One With Nature: The Druid Class
desc: A free druid class. The Druid explores the natural world and channels its power in combat, including the ability to wild-shape into animal forms.

title: Plague Jewels of Sekhmet
desc: A 0-level funnel set in the ruins of a cenotaph dedicated to the war-goddess Sekhmet. Characters awaken deep in the tomb with no memories and a spreading plague, and must fight through twelve lethal chambers to reach the surface. Includes optional tournament play rules.

title: Pleasures of the Dream Palace
desc: A dungeon crawl for 3rd- to 5th-level characters. Sinister demonic entanglements tied to a respectable village family lead to the Dream Palace: a surreal, trap-laden otherworldly space with a poor survival rate for visitors.

title: Reaping at Beltine
desc: A 3rd-level adventure in the town of Beltine, on the anniversary of a brutal family slaughter. The Kugo family has returned from death as monstrous risen puppets, and the town's survival depends on the party.

title: Shadowdark RPG
desc: The complete Shadowdark RPG core rules: a dark fantasy dungeon crawling game with a lean d20 system and real-time torch tracking that keeps sessions fast and tense. The 326-page book covers four base classes, the Western Reaches setting, a bestiary, and introductory adventures. Winner of the 2024 Three Castles Award and four gold ENNIEs including Product of the Year.

title: Shadowdark RPG Quickstart Set
desc: A free two-booklet introduction to Shadowdark RPG: a 68-page Player's Guide with the core rules and eight premade 1st-level characters, and a 68-page GM's Guide with encounter tools and a ready-to-run dungeon adventure. Suitable for characters of 1st through 3rd level.

title: Shadowdome Thunderdark Zine: Community Sourced Adventure for Gary Con XVI
desc: A community-sourced megadungeon generator created for Gary Con XVI, featuring 11 new monsters, 50 dungeon rooms, and trap and hazard roll tables with over 1,700 possible results.

title: Shapeshifter Class
desc: A class focused on mastering animal forms through study and attunement. The Shapeshifter bonds with animals over time, gaining the ability to communicate with them and transform into their physical forms.

title: Shrine of the Jaguar Princess
desc: A 4th-level dungeon set within the ziggurat of an ancient jungle princess. Twenty-six trap-filled chambers of puzzles and ambushes guard a golden idol and stranger secrets beyond. Silver ENnie Award winner (Best Adventure, 2023).

title: SoloDark: Solo Rules for Shadowdark RPG
desc: The official free solo rules for Shadowdark RPG: a 12-page PDF providing an oracle system, random prompt tables, and alternate mechanics for GMless solo play.

title: Soulblight - A Shadowdark Setting
desc: The first major third-party setting for Shadowdark, set in the kingdom of Lothorian as it succumbs to the Soulblight: a spreading corruption unleashed by powerful ancient beings called the Sovereigns. Covers all seven regions with maps, two new classes, 100+ monsters, and optional survival and corruption rules.

title: Soulblight - Blades, Guts & Gold
desc: The second Soulblight supplement, focused on henchmen who follow adventurers into the depths for pay. Offers 14 henchman classes across combat, support, and utility, alongside mechanics for follower loyalty and character customization through random tables.

title: Soulblight - Champions of Lothorian
desc: The first character supplement for the Soulblight setting, adding six classes suited to Lothorian's grim world: Bard, Dreamwalker, Pyromancer, Reaver, Starspeaker, and Templar. Includes 50+ new spells and magical abilities, two new magical disciplines, and shrine mechanics for Lothorian's gods.

title: Soulblight - Forever Hold Your Peace
desc: A 3rd-to-5th level adventure set in the temple of Sandreaver, goddess of the Scorpionfolk. The party infiltrates the sacred hall during a major divine ceremony, contending with religious traps, ritual hazards, and the attendants of two competing deities.

title: Soulblight - Hamartia
desc: A 292-page Soulblight expansion set on the Mediterranean-inspired Islands of Hamartis, where the players are delivered to an island penal colony by royal decree. Multiple paths forward — escape, rebellion, or piracy — play out across a hexcrawl, a 50+ room dungeon, and 100+ new monsters.

title: Soulblight - Swords and Sorceries
desc: A free anthology of adventures covering the breadth of the Soulblight setting, taking parties across Lothorian's varied environments, from jungle temples and desert ruins to planar expeditions and underworld oddities across the seven realms.

title: Soulblight - The Dying Vale
desc: An 82-page Soulblight hexcrawl set in a region of Lothorian already lost to the Sovereigns' corruption, populated by scattered survivors. Includes the Old Hero's Tomb dungeon, 90+ new monsters, and mechanics for tracking the blight's advance.

title: Soulblight - The First Cycle
desc: A 240-page Soulblight expansion set in the prehistoric Nameless Valleys, long before Lothorian's kingdoms existed. Covers an early bronze-age world of tribal peoples in a hexcrawl format, including the Amber Hold dungeon, 100+ new monsters, period-appropriate gear, and rules for overland travel and early magical rites.

title: Soulblight - The Indigo Outpost Feuilleton
desc: A seven-issue broadsheet zine expanding each of Lothorian's regions, from the Lothor Desert to the Blue Glades. Each issue adds regional lore, monster ecologies, bounty targets, new items, and locations for Soulblight campaigns.

title: Soulblight - Vagrants and Vagabonds
desc: The third Soulblight character supplement, adding eight classes reflecting Lothorian's harsh social realities: Alchemist, Bandit, Beggar, Blight Doctor, Gladiator, Graverobber, Mauler, and Vestal of Fire. Includes expanded gear, rival NPC adventurers, and optional rules for madness and serious wounds.

title: Temple of the Green Devil
desc: A competitive tournament module in which two groups simultaneously plunder a jungle temple during a solar eclipse. Each group can hinder the other with summoned monsters, traps, and curses. Available in a free art-free edition and a paid deluxe edition.

title: The Beast: Werewolf Class
desc: A half-feral class built around primal instincts and escalating physical power. At higher levels, the Beast unlocks full werewolf transformation, bringing savage ferocity to combat.

title: The King: Shadowdark RPG Class
desc: A Conan-inspired martial class. The King leads allies through danger, accumulates power through bold deeds rather than careful planning, and builds a living legend through conquest and adventure.

title: The Nightmare at Castle Goldgloom
desc: A 0-level funnel set in an accursed ruined castle. A group of hapless villagers must delve into Castle Goldgloom, brave whatever horrors lurk in its nightmare-haunted halls, and make it back out alive... ideally with treasure.

title: The Pits of Brund
desc: A 70-page megadungeon spanning levels 1–6. A recently rediscovered series of caves descends deep into the barrow-earth, with six layers of encounters, hazards, and plunder waiting below.

title: The Tomb of the Hunters
desc: A 5-room dungeon created for the Shadowdark Independent Game Jam. Features evocative monster encounters and layered exploration in a compact tomb.

title: The Witch, the Shepherd, His Goats, and Their Daughter
desc: A fairy tale forest point-crawl for 1st- to 2nd-level characters. The shepherd's daughter and goats have been stolen by the Witch of the Woods. Twelve forest encounter sites full of strange, fearsome, and fey monsters stand between the party and their return. Suitable for one to three sessions.

title: Tomb of the Dusk Queen
desc: A compact 1st-level dungeon with fourteen rooms spread across the tomb of the Dusk Queen. Short enough for a single session and well-suited to introducing players to Shadowdark's lethal pace.

title: Two Strong Arms: The Barbarian Class
desc: A free Barbarian class. A mighty martial class built around raw physical power and ferocity.

title: Unnatural Selection: A Supplement for use with Shadowdark
desc: A 160-page third-party supplement expanding character options with 12 new ancestries, 6 new classes, 120 spells, and new monsters and magic items, plus a zero-level gauntlet adventure and three one-shot adventures.

title: Woeful Barrows And Other Places
desc: An adventure anthology featuring nine distinct locations for levels 1–5. Each site presents its own hazards, inhabitants, and rewards for parties exploring the wider region.
